intent_policy: This task is for retrieval-conditioned writing and evaluation when the author has a reasonably clear scene direction.
Output only the author-facing detailed writing intent.
Keep the output schema minimal; do not add seed entities, retrieval needs, query plans, simulation plans, scene beats, or answer hints as separate fields.

Keep natural author-facing anchors such as central character names, main location, key object, vehicle, facility, organization, occasion, mission target, or immediate setup when they are important to the writing intent.
Capture the broad scene function, emotional direction, relationship dynamic, atmosphere, pressure, transition, and stakes when the source supports them.
Avoid full synopsis, beat lists, exact dialogue, evidence spans, and overly specific choreography.
Avoid retrieval instructions such as what to retrieve, query, recall, look up, or rank.
The output must be parseable JSON.
